_comment: Pre-season banner settings, shown on the live page BEFORE any match has real data. The page auto-switches to the points leaderboard once a fixture goes live or finishes — same URL throughout. buyIn is a number; currency is the symbol shown before it. deadline is an ISO timestamp (UTC) used for the live countdown; deadlineLabel is the human string shown on the banner. headline/tagline are cheeky copy — edit freely. Safe to commit: contains no personal data.
headline: Who's brave enough?
tagline: Get your buy-in down before the draw — no dosh, no teams, no glory.
